# Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Scope

- [ ] This PR is focused on one logical change.
- [ ] PMDM/PocketFlow upstream code changes are intentional and explained.
- [ ] Generated data, checkpoints, caches, and local environment files are not committed.

## Validation

- [ ] `python -m compileall -q scripts src`
- [ ] Relevant experiment, ETL, or analysis checks are documented in the PR.
- [ ] CI passes.

## Documentation

- [ ] `CONTEXT.md` terminology is preserved.
- [ ] ADRs were reviewed for constraints.
- [ ] A new ADR or doc update is included when this changes contracts, data policy, model design, or evaluation semantics.
